description: Letter from Avraham son of the Gaʾon, in Ṣahrajt, to Sahlān b. Avraham, in Fustat. Dating: probably ca. 1030. He reports that he has arrived "here" and apologizes for not having written from Ṣahrajt the day prior as the addressee wanted him to. He plans to return to Minyat al-Qāʾid. In the margin he adds a request (in Judaeo-Arabic) for a riding animal with a saddle, so that he can enter (Fustat?) on it.
description_he: מכתב מאברהם בן הגאון, בצהרג'ת, לסהלאן בן אברהם, פוסטאט, בערך 1030. הגיע ומתנצל על אי-כתיבה ביום הקודם.
